title: Ask About The Orthodox Faith | Not actually a question, more a desire to share my first experience in a Russian Orthodox Church | Facebook
content: [Log In](https://www.facebook.com/login/device-based/regular/login/?login_attempt=1&next=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fgroups%2Fask.about.the.orthodox.faith%2Fposts%2F7057296120957597). [Forgot Account?](https://www.facebook.com/recover/initiate?ars=royal_blue_bar). A heartfelt experience at a Russian Orthodox church in Seattle. [](https://www.facebook.com/groups/594402733913667/?__cft__[0]=AZYOmG0f8JkRA2jIWyZbGWbzcQdwTiOdRDuBLcGJj1NKYkXhAy82h5oEVt5Sd64sWIWW1oq1pS-c-tv4mIUUT3llf_eBOCSk8w4xEovhP0h99I5CzXoe7z6AyPZHEPTVl9dI7l5rDpjeZSxW9BPPL_KA5hWqQI7yhnimp0sX_2vCy0scFeberNaxsjtpGgIcV0VMTO2N5R1j8su9rBA8DVif&__tn__=%3C%3C%2CP-R). ## [Ask About The Orthodox Faith](https://www.facebook.com/groups/594402733913667/?__cft__[0]=AZYOmG0f8JkRA2jIWyZbGWbzcQdwTiOdRDuBLcGJj1NKYkXhAy82h5oEVt5Sd64sWIWW1oq1pS-c-tv4mIUUT3llf_eBOCSk8w4xEovhP0h99I5CzXoe7z6AyPZHEPTVl9dI7l5rDpjeZSxW9BPPL_KA5hWqQI7yhnimp0sX_2vCy0scFeberNaxsjtpGgIcV0VMTO2N5R1j8su9rBA8DVif&__tn__=-UC%2CP-R) ·. · [November 8, 2023](https://www.facebook.com/groups/594402733913667/?multi_permalinks=7057296120957597&hoisted_section_header_type=recently_seen&__cft__[0]=AZYOmG0f8JkRA2jIWyZbGWbzcQdwTiOdRDuBLcGJj1NKYkXhAy82h5oEVt5Sd64sWIWW1oq1pS-c-tv4mIUUT3llf_eBOCSk8w4xEovhP0h99I5CzXoe7z6AyPZHEPTVl9dI7l5rDpjeZSxW9BPPL_KA5hWqQI7yhnimp0sX_2vCy0scFeberNaxsjtpGgIcV0VMTO2N5R1j8su9rBA8DVif&__tn__=%2CO%2CP-R) ·. Not actually a question, more a desire to share my first experience in a Russian Orthodox Church. I don’t have words to express their welcoming nature of this clearly not Russian-American who showed up at the front door, and mostly I stood in the back reverently and cried silently. Afterwards, the gracious priest welcomed me to respectfully take pictures of the beauty of much artwork that was smuggled out of Russia under persecution. title: Faith Holidays Reviews | Real Testimonials from Happy Travelers
content: We had a great time. Delicious food and comfortable accommodations. Tour guide was excellent. Very comfortable transportation bus. Unforgettable experience.
